resources.string: Failed to launch any app, are you sure you have used any?
Please grant access to usage stats via settings, Shizuku or root access. You can do this in Settings -> Apps -> Special app access -> Usage access -> Recents -> Permit usage access

Android 8.0+ and root or Shizuku required. May work a bit differently than the regular \"recent apps\" menu, as a \"running app\" here means a package that has an active task. For example, apps that you\'ve quit with the back button don\'t have active tasks, hence they will be excluded.
Root or Shizuku required. Swipe to kill is available only if the \"Show only running apps\" setting is enabled.
Select which activity is the default. The \"Last\" option launches the last app, whereas the \"Recents\" option launches the recent apps. The other screen will always be available via the shortcuts.
Launching two work apps in split view is not supported!
Launching apps in split view requires at least two apps!
Freeform mode is unsupported on your device!
The app encountered a problem! Please report an issue on GitHub and paste the below text.
